message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT2 check $(date) ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
tail -8 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
echo "=== DRT2 check $(date) ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
tail -8 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
